headline: Sports Psychology Fundamentals
description: Sports psychology applies psychological principles to athletic performance and well-being. Core techniques: goal setting (SMART: Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, Time-bound), visualization (mental rehearsal), self-talk (positive/cognitive restructuring), arousal regulation (breathing, progressive relaxation), concentration training (mindfulness, pre-performance routines).

citation.name: Foundations of Sport and Exercise Psychology (Weinberg & Gould, 7th Ed)
APA Division 47: Exercise and Sport Psychology
